name: Weihai Guangtai Airport Equipment Co.,Ltd
summary: Weihai Guangtai Airport Equipment Co.,Ltd manufactures and sells ground support equipment and fire-fighting equipment in China and internationally. The ground support equipment segment offers aircraft service, ground handling, air cargo, runway maintenance, aircraft refueling, and passenger cabin service to airline companies, airports, aircraft manufacturing companies, and flight test institutes. The fire-fighting equipment segment provides fire-fighting vehicles, aerial platform, aerial ladder, water tanker, and emergency rescue products; and automatic fire alarm system, large space fire monitor system, electrical fire monitoring system, intelligent emergency lighting and evacuation indicating system, special detectors, and S-type aerosol. It also offers special vehicle and industrial drone; and after-sale services. The company was founded in 1991 and is based in Weihai, China.
